questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Is my son 24 years old?
Statements: I. Four years later, he will be twenty years younger than me.
II. At present, I am twenty years older than him.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Are some books chocolates?
Statements: I. All books are ducks.
II. All ducks are chocolates.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Is A the mother of B?
Statements: I. B is the son of A.
II. A is older than B.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What is the speed of train A?
Statements: I. It crosses a bridge in 5 seconds.
II. The train is 200 m long.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What is the speed of train A?
Statements: I. It crosses a pole in 5 seconds.
II. The train is 200 m long.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Is A the father of B?
Statements: I. A is the father of X.
II. X is the mother of B.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Is A the father of B?
Statements: I. A is the father of C.
II. C is the brother of B.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Who is the tallest among A, B and C?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is taller than C.
